title: lessingia glandulifera var. peirsonii
intro: Lessingia glandulifera var. peirsonii, also known as Peirson's fleabane, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Peirson's fleabane include its ability to support the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Peirson's fleabane can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
